The '''''Kestrel Nova''''' was a [[Coruscant-class Heavy Courier|Crescent-X9]] captured from pirates at [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] c. [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]].

[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] disguised as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], piloted this ship to [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]], in order to infiltrate the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] {{1st}}
